---
title: "Introduction"
---

::: {.callout-note}
**Why this project exists and the context a reader needs to make sense of it.**
Set the scene: the world or problem this project sits inside, and what was
already known or already tried before you started.
:::

<!--
prompt:
  - What is the broader problem or domain this project is part of?
  - What was the state of things before this project — what existed, what
    didn't, what was painful?
  - Why is this project worth doing now, in this form?
  - What should a reader hold in mind as they read the rest of the document?
-->
